title: Slack send input
description: Arguments for an explicitly approved Slack send request.

channel_id.description: Real Slack channel ID such as C..., G..., or D.... Do not put a human name here.

channel_ref.description: Opaque Otto channel reference returned by Slack read/list/open tools.

channel.description: Slack channel name such as #incidents. For people/DMs, use user_id instead.

user_id.description: Real Slack user ID such as U... or W... for sending a DM. If the user gives a name like John, call list_users first and pass the returned user_id.

user.description: Slack user ID or human name for a DM. Prefer user_id from list_users to avoid ambiguity.

recipient_id.description: Alias for user_id when the target is a Slack DM recipient.

recipient.description: Alias for user. Prefer a real Slack user ID from list_users.

thread_ts.description: Optional Slack thread timestamp for channel replies.

thread_ref.description: Optional Otto thread reference returned by read tools.

text.description: Message body to send after approval.
